templates.name: Permission Denied
templates.template:
Hi {customer_name},

I understand you're unable to access certain features due to permission restrictions.

Your current role: {role}
Required role for this feature: {required_role}

Next steps:
1. Contact your workspace admin to request a role upgrade
2. Admin can change roles via Admin Console > Team > Change Role
3. Changes take effect immediately

If you're the admin and still experiencing issues, let me know and I'll investigate further.

Best regards,
Support Team
